query: Please update `docs/api/use-hover.md` after the changes in `src/composables/interactions/use-hover.ts` and make sure the defaults still match the implementation.
I changed `useFocusTrap` behavior and tests. Sync the docs and examples so the API page and guide references are accurate.
Review the VFloat docs for `offset` and middleware and fix any broken links, stale examples, or VitePress issues you find.
Explain the difference between `useHover` and `useFocus` for tooltips right here. Do not edit any docs.
Fix the `useFocusTrap` implementation and add tests for returning focus on close.
Update the README install section for npm, pnpm, and bun.
